name: Hot and Spicy Black-Eyed Peas
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the bacon slices until they are crisp.
2. In a large frypan or electric frypan, combine all remaining ingredients and heat to a low boil. Turn off the heat and let it simmer for 30 minutes.
3. Crumble the bacon pieces over the top of the mixture.
4. Serve hot and enjoy!
